entry.title: IDC FA810606D0001 (P00019) awarded to THE BOEING COMPANY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THE MODIFICATION IS TO CLOSE OUT THE DOWNWARD ADJUSTMENT FOR FINAL FORWARD PRICING RATE AGREEMENT (FPRA) RATES AND FACTORS (DEC 2009) CLAUSE ESTABLISHED IN CONTRACT MODIFICATION FA8106-06-D-0001-P00015 AND P00016 FOR APPLICATION TO CY2010 AND CY 2011 RATE MATRIX FOR IDS - WICHITA, BOEING AEROSPACE OPERATIONS, AND WIDEBAND COMMUNICATION AND RF SYSTEMS (WCRS). THE MODIFICATION IS RETROACTIVE BACK TO 1 JAN 2010.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER AIRCRAFT PARTS AND AUXILIARY EQUIPMENT MANUFACTURING

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC FA810606D0001 (P00020) awarded to THE BOEING COMPANY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THE MODIFICATION IS TO EXERCISE OPTION PERIOD 1, INCORPORATE PRICING FOR CLIN 5001, AND INCORPORATE A NEW PROVISION INTO CONTRACT FA8106-06-D-0001.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER AIRCRAFT PARTS AND AUXILIARY EQUIPMENT MANUFACTURING

entry.title: IDC FA810606D0001 (P00024) awarded to THE BOEING COMPANY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THE MODIFICATION IS TO EXERCISE OPTION PERIOD II, INCORPORATE PRICING FOR CLIN 6001, AND TO UPDATE CALENDAR YEAR (CY) 2011 AND 2012 RATE MATRIX FOR IDS - WICHITA (BDS-W), BOEING AEROSPACE OPERATIONS (BAO), AND WIDEBAND COMMUNICATION AND RF SYSTEMS (WCRS) INTO CONTRACT FA8106-06-D-0001.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: MAINT/REPAIR/REBUILD OF EQUIPMENT- AIRCRAFT AND AIRFRAME STRUCTURAL COMPONENTS

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THE MODIFICATION IS TO:TO UPDATE THE LABOR RATE MATRIX TO INCORPORATE FOUR (4) NEW BAO NON-LABOR BURDEN FACTORS.

entry.title: IDC FA810606D0001 (P00026) awarded to THE BOEING COMPANY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO MAKE CORRECTIONS TO THE BOEING WICHITA SECTION IN THE UPDATE TO CALENDAR YEAR (CY) 2011 AND 2012 RATE MATRIX FOR IDS - WICHITA (BDS-W), BOEING AEROSPACE OPERATIONS (BAO), AND WIDEBAND COMMUNICATION AND RF SYSTEMS (WCRS) INTO CONTRACT FA8106-06-D-0001.

entry.title: IDC FA810606D0001 (P00027) awarded to THE BOEING COMPANY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO EXERCISE OPTION PERIOD III, INCORPORATE PRICING FOR CLIN 7001 ON THE SUSTAINMENT MATRIX, AND TO UPDATE THE CALENDAR YEAR (CY) 2013 LABOR RATE MATRIX FOR BOEING DEFENSE SPACE&SECURITY - WICHITA (BDS-W), BOEING AEROSPACE OPERATIONS (BAO), AND WIDEBAND COMMUNICATION AND RF SYSTEMS (WCRS) INTO CONTRACT FA8106-06-D-0001.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: MAINT/REPAIR/REBUILD OF EQUIPMENT- AIRCRAFT AND AIRFRAME STRUCTURAL COMPONENTS

entry.title: IDC FA810606D0001 (P00028) awarded to THE BOEING COMPANY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE CALENDAR YEAR (CY) 2013 TIME AND MATERIALS (T&M) RATES AND FACTORS FOR SAN ANTONIO INTO THE LABOR RATE MATRIX IN SECTION J, TO REVISE THE STATEMENT OF WORK (SOW) DOCUMENT INTO PERFORMANCE WORK STATEMENT (PWS), AND TO INCORPORATE REVISION 4, DATED 25 APRIL 13, OF THE PWS LK-PWS-E4B-5OE434 INTO BASIC CONTRACT FA8106-06-D-0001.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: MAINT/REPAIR/REBUILD OF EQUIPMENT- AIRCRAFT AND AIRFRAME STRUCTURAL COMPONENTS

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER AIRCRAFT PARTS AND AUXILIARY EQUIPMENT MANUFACTURING

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
